meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template to Ship Fast
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on client work. Learn to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to automate your development workflow and ship faster.
content.answer_block: The 'can't finish' cycle stems from decision fatigue and architectural drift. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you standardize your stack, eliminate boilerplate, and force momentum. Combined with Claude Code, you transform from a manual coder into an architectural orchestrator, ensuring every project reaches production in record time.
content.intro:
The graveyard of unfinished projects is littered with good intentions and broken momentum. You start with a burst of creative energy, only to hit the 'middle-of-the-project' wall where scope creep and architectural indecision turn your enthusiasm into technical debt. The professional difference between a hobbyist and a high-earning freelancer isn't talent; it’s the ability to sustain velocity through rigid, repeatable systems.

Enter the Antigravity project template. It is your architectural blueprint, designed to strip away the trivial decisions that stall progress. When you pair this structured foundation with the autonomous execution power of Claude Code, you don't just write code—you deploy solutions. It’s time to stop agonizing over file structures and start delivering value to clients who pay for results, not process.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the standardized directory structure and environment variables to ensure consistency across all client projects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity standard template with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Define the Schema and Business Logic
steps.description: Map out your data requirements. Using the template ensures your database interactions are abstracted and type-safe from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a database schema for a SaaS user management system including profiles, subscription tiers, and project logs.

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Stop writing CRUD endpoints manually. Use the template's built-in generators to create API routes and UI components instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate CRUD endpoints for the 'projects' table and corresponding data-table UI components using the Antigravity component library.

steps.title: Inject Custom Client Requirements
steps.description: Apply project-specific branding and business rules onto the stable core you've just built.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the UI components to match the client's brand color palette #2A5C82 and add a custom validation rule for project deadlines.

steps.title: Finalize and Deploy
steps.description: Run the automated testing and deployment suite to ensure your project is production-ready without manual intervention.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the full test suite, lint the code, and provide a deployment summary for Vercel integration.

pro_tips: Always use a 'State Lock' file in your template to prevent Claude Code from drifting into unauthorized architectural patterns.
Treat your Antigravity template as a living product; commit improvements back to your base repo every time you finish a client project.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to store client-specific style guides so you don't have to redefine them in every session.
Pre-configure 'Ghost Routes' in your template for features you know you'll add later, saving hours of routing setup.
Run periodic 'Architecture Audits' using Claude Code to ensure your project hasn't deviated from the Antigravity core standards.
content.next_steps: After completing your first build, document your custom component library within the template so you can reuse it for your next high-ticket client.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting projects die in the draft phase. Master the tools that turn hours of work into minutes of execution. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
